category_title: Adolescents positioned as struggling readers who disengage from standardized tasks but engage with self-selected literature
scenario_title: Standardized Test Preparation in Remedial Reading Class
minimal_context: The student is reading passages from past standardized tests and answering multiple choice questions during a daily one-hour remedial reading class.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: For today's hour, please read this passage from a past standardized test and answer the multiple choice questions.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Flips through the pages quickly) I read it. I'm just really bored with it.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please move on to the multiple choice questions now.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I'll just read the questions and pick the answer from what I remember.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Try to go back to the story to find the correct answers.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I would never go back to the story. Man this isn't really that important if I do anything.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: For today's hour, please read this passage from a past standardized test and answer the multiple choice questions.

STUDENT: (Flips through the pages quickly) I read it. I'm just really bored with it.

TUTOR: Please move on to the multiple choice questions now.

STUDENT: I'll just read the questions and pick the answer from what I remember.

TUTOR: Try to go back to the story to find the correct answers.

STUDENT: I would never go back to the story. Man this isn't really that important if I do anything.

task.content: Read passages from past standardized tests and answer multiple choice questions

context.materials: Past standardized test passages, multiple choice questions, notebooks, sticky notes

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: Being required to read past standardized test passages and answer multiple choice questions, which stripped her of agency to choose what, when, and how she read
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Reads the stories without paying attention, reads the questions and picks the answer from memory, and never goes back to the story
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Perceived standardized testing as an inauthentic literacy practice that contained little present or future value; felt really bored
related_quotes: I would read the stories and I wouldn ’tp a y attention to the stories. And I would read the questions and I would, just from what I remem-bered, I would pick the answer. And I would never go back to the story.
Man this isn ’t really that important if I do anything.

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Withholding of effort to pass them; picking answers from memory without referring back to the text
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Felt the task was not really that important
related_quotes: I would read the questions and I would, just from what I remem-bered, I would pick the answer.
